concept: Cool / Moderately Cold / Refreshingly Not Warm
description: Of a fairly low temperature; giving relief from heat. 'Neri' names the quality of coolness—temperature that refreshes, air that soothes.
sound_symbolism: The word refreshes. 'Ne' settles with calm presence, heat fading. Then 'ri' flows with crisp ease, coolness achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'neri sihewa' (cool breeze). Between 'sulae' (warm) and 'pelui' (cold)—moderate temperature that refreshes without chilling.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Cool design reduces energy—passive cooling through shade and airflow rather than mechanical systems.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Cool spaces provided refuge—shade, water, and evening air offered relief from heat.
